title: Sirio Design System from INPS
content: # INPS Systems Directories Components Articles Blueprints Guides Glossary Biweekly Digest Created by Adobe Alaska Airlines Amazon Apple Atlassian Audi Basis Biings Brainly Carrefour Cash App CBRE Build Cisco Datadog Dell Docplanner eBay Elastic Esri General Electric Github GitLab Google GOV.UK Gusto Helly Hansen IBM Ideagen Kajabi Kiwicom Lemon Squeezy Line LocalTapiola Michelin Microsoft Monday.com MongoDB Motorway Mozilla Nordhealth Ontario Orange Palantir Pinterest Pluralsight Porsche Razorpay Red Hat Rei Salesforce Samsung Seek Segment ServiceNow Shopify Skoda Sprout Social SumUp Sunrise Teamleader Thumbtack Twilio U.S. Web UAE Uber Vercel Visa Washington Post Wikimedia Wise Wonderflow Workday WorkOS Zendesk Keep up with the latest in Design Systems Subscribe Sirio from Directories: Components: INPS Design System is a tailored framework for the Istituto Nazionale della Previdenza Sociale in Italy. It combines design standards, principles, and reusable components to create intuitive, accessible, and visually coherent interfaces for INPS's digital platforms. Sirio emphasizes user-centric design and accessibility, ensuring that services are easy to navigate and inclusive for a diverse audience, from young workers to elderly pensioners.
